message:
✨ Share web terminals via tmux (#31)

- Terminal sessions now spawn inside tmux, so you can attach from
  your laptop with: tmux attach -t <session-name>
- Web UI header shows the tmux attach command
- Falls back to bare shell if tmux is not installed
- REST response includes tmuxSession field

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
